case_title: RADWA MOUSTAFA VS. XUN LING HU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,551.00 FILED BY MOUSTAFA, RADWA AS TO DEFENDANT HU, XUN LING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HU, XUN LING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-20-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HU, XUN LING
ORDER (SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT - THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---ERIC HUANG. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID FLEISIG. FILED BY MOUSTAFA, RADWA HU, XUN LING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.
